name: serverest-api-testing
description: Testes automatizados de API REST (Usuários) do ServeRest com Postman e Newman.

scripts.newman: newman run "collections/Exercicio EBAC teste de API.postman_collection.json" -e "environments/Exercicio EBAC.postman_environment.json" --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html

author: Gedeon Guerra
